
### control hazard


```gnuassembler
0x00: cmpq %r8, %r9
0x08: je   0xFFFF
0x10: addq %r10, %r11
```

::: {.r-stack}

![](/pipeline/texfig/controlHazard.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-out fragment-index=2 width=1000px}

![](/pipeline/texfig/controlHazard.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2 width=1000px}


:::
